history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A digital illustration of Sasuke Uchiha from Naruto, depicted in a dynamic, anime art style with a vibrant purple and electric lightning effect. He is shown from the chest up, looking directly at the viewer with his signature serious expression. Sasuke wears a gray hooded jacket, zipped up to his neck.

The image is presented as a game interface or profile card. At the top, Japanese characters are visible, with "勝利" (Shōri - Victory) and "LV 15" prominently displayed. To the right, "フェスティバル" (Festival) is also written. Below Sasuke's portrait, there's a row of circular icons, each with a different emblem, suggesting abilities or items. Further down, numerical statistics are shown: "17", a skull icon with "5", and "7". A golden "MVP" badge is centered below these stats. The date and time are displayed at the bottom: "05.02 23:52" and "05.02 23:52".

The background features a grid pattern overlay with a gradient of dark blue to purple, enhancing the electric theme. Bright purple lightning bolts crackle and emanate from behind and around Sasuke, illuminating the scene and creating a sense of power and intensity. The overall color palette is dominated by dark blues, purples, and the stark white of the lightning. The mood is intense, powerful, and celebratory, fitting for an "MVP" screen in a game. The lighting is dramatic and focused, with the purple glow of the lightning being the primary light source, casting sharp highlights and deep shadows.
